description: Curated registry of @adiled's OSS projects under distribution. Self-contained: tier, dossier path, and one-line note for each project. Live state (stars, push date, description) lives on GitHub and is one click away from each row in the dashboard.

projects.note: Anchor. Small TypeScript library and CLI for resampling OHLCV candles between time frames. Live on npm at 1.2.1 with recurring weekly downloads; v2.0.0 staged on feat/cli-improvements with working CLI, install.sh, and Changesets release flow.

Live. Single-file opencode plugin adding /cd, /mv, /add-dir slash commands by writing to opencode's sqlite session state. Paired with OPENCODE_GAP.md upstream proposal that already drew a maintainer response on opencode#2177. v1.0.6 to v1.0.8 ship a syntax error in index.ts; fix-and-republish is the dominant launch blocker.

Live. OpenCode sidecar that delegates model calls to Claude Code CLI and replaces the file/edit toolset with AST-grounded tools, JSONL grafting, and a context-loss watcher. v0.24.19 shipped, launch artifact pending.
Live. Claude Code companion that scores bot/driver vibe over time. v1.5.0 release-ready. crates.io and Homebrew remaining.

Pre-launch. Programming language whose runtime substrate is رشتہ (kinship), with kinship-typed lineage edges, cascading consent revocation, and Merkle-chained گواہی testimony. Workshop-grade paper compiled. License is the only hard blocker.

Pre-launch. Linux daemon that runs OpenCode sessions on Linear tickets one at a time, with the operator routed in over Telegram only when the question assay marks it worth answering. No tagged release yet, README ahead of CLI, demo and adils.me thesis post outstanding.

Pre-launch. Rust parser and library for the Orchfile format, a Containerfile-shaped service-orchestration DSL with systemd-drop-in overlay semantics. Emits stable JSON for downstream generators (orchd is one). v0.2.0 local tag; crates.io publish blocked on name (orch is taken; orchfile available).
Pre-launch. Execution engine for the Orch spec. Linux-only until launchd platform lands.
Companion. Public scratch directory of one clwnd-driven session, single commit, unedited. Not promoted standalone. License (#1) open and current.
Cultural. Browser-native Khowar lookup served from adils.me/khowar, around 8,200 entries from the rachitrali corpus, rendered in Awami Nastaliq. Separate orbit from the agentic-systems thesis.
